fragments.name: kernel-scope
fragments.description: Materialized structural policy scope for kernel-owned invariants and authority boundaries.

fragments.name: admission-scope
fragments.description: Admission policy scope surface for normalized-state legality bundles and bounded policy declarations.

fragments.name: data-scope
fragments.description: Data policy scope surface for static data assumptions and admitted-state class declarations.

notes: Authoritative source module for the policy-scope surface slice. It materializes the previously missing policy/kernel structural surface and binds all three policy subplanes into one executable slice.
